mapper.select: select distinct srm.menu_id from sys_role_menu srm left join sys_role sr on sr.role_id = srm.role_id left join sys_user_role sur on sur.role_id = sr.role_id where sur.user_id = #{userId} and sr.status = '0'

select distinct sm.perms from sys_menu sm where sm.menu_id in ( select srm.menu_id from sys_role_menu srm left join sys_role sr on sr.role_id = srm.role_id left join sys_user_role sur on sur.role_id = sr.role_id where sur.user_id = #{userId} and sr.status = '0' ) and sm.perms is not null and sm.perms != ''

select distinct sm.perms from sys_menu sm where sm.menu_id in ( select srm.menu_id from sys_role_menu srm left join sys_role sr on sr.role_id = srm.role_id where srm.role_id = #{roleId} and sr.status = '0' ) and sm.perms is not null and sm.perms != ''

select sm.menu_id from sys_menu sm where sm.menu_id in ( select srm.menu_id from sys_role_menu srm left join sys_role sr on sr.role_id = srm.role_id where srm.role_id = #{roleId} and sr.status = '0' )
and sm.menu_id not in ( select parent_id from sys_menu where menu_id in ( select srm.menu_id from sys_role_menu srm left join sys_role sr on sr.role_id = srm.role_id where srm.role_id = #{roleId} and sr.status = '0' ) )
order by sm.parent_id asc, sm.order_num asc
